inputs.text: Mujhe bahut bukhar hai, sir dard kar raha hai, bahut hi jaldi se bukhar chadha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever and headache are common symptoms

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, not enough information to confirm

inputs.text: Mujhe aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, haddiyan toot rahi hain, bukhar abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Aankhon ke peeche dard is a key symptom of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mujhe lal daane ho gaye hain, masoodon se khoon aa raha hai, bukhar kam ho gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Lal daane, masoodon se khoon, and decreased fever confirm Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Lack of specific symptoms rules out viral fever

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: No characteristic symptoms of malaria are present

inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, pehle se zyada lal daane ho gaye hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Persistent symptoms and worsening condition confirm Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to specific Dengue symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of characteristic symptoms
